name: Focaccia#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water, olive oil, and 1 teaspoon salt and sugar.
2. Gradually stir in the flour until you can no longer stir by hand.
3. Turn dough onto a floured board and knead until smooth and elastic.
4. Place dough in an oiled bowl and let rise for 30-40 minutes or until doubled in size.
5. Shape dough into an oval about half an inch thick using a rolling pin.
6. Make decorative cuts on the top of the loaf with a sharp knife.
7. Place loaf on an oiled baking sheet, brush with olive oil, and sprinkle with coarse sea salt (and optional chopped green olives or onions).
8. Let rise for 20 minutes.
9. Preheat oven to 450°F.
10. Bake until nicely browned, about 20-30 minutes.
11. Serve hot from the oven.
